message:
fix(security): use command description instead of CLI example as palette prompt

Kernel-registered commands had their Examples[0].Command used verbatim
as the prompt text sent to agent panes via GetPalette(). CLI examples
are documentation strings that may contain dangerous arguments (e.g.
`ntm preflight "rm -rf /"`). Selecting such a command in the dashboard
palette would literally type the dangerous example into targeted agent
panes.

Replace with cmd.Description, which describes the user's intent (e.g.
"Lint and validate a prompt before sending") rather than a raw CLI
invocation with arbitrary arguments.

Fixes #56

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
